name: tally
desc: A cheerful friar in his late thirties: the last friar of the Order of Lamplighters. Round-faced and round-bodied, warm brown skin, small round brass spectacles, a messy halo of sandy-grey curls with a balding crown like a natural tonsure, permanently on the edge of a delighted smile. He wears a patched charcoal-indigo friar's robe, over it a mustard-yellow travel stole embroidered with small lantern sigils, a rope belt hung with a dozen tiny brass oil-charms, a snuffed brass hand-lantern at his hip, and sturdy sandals over thick wool socks.
sheetHint: same round face, brass spectacles, sandy-grey curls with balding crown, charcoal-indigo robe, mustard-yellow lantern stole, rope belt with brass charms, hand-lantern at hip, sandals over wool socks

expressions.happy: beaming with delight, eyes crinkled shut, a huge warm open smile
expressions.awed: spectacles slightly slipped down his nose, mouth open, eyes wide and shining — the face of a man seeing his first living flame
expressions.earnest: leaning slightly in toward the viewer, brows lifted, an eager hands-clasped earnest energy, small hopeful smile
